text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O and I are having a<n>meeting, when...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My apologies. It seems yesterday<n>has left a
lingering effect on me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
En route to the academy, I found<n>myself in the
rain's sweet embrace. I<n>indulged said opportunity
until I<n>arrived at the dorm.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The exhibition we wove together was<n>both
magical and rife with passion...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Even now, my head still spins from<n>the
spectacle—the heat pulsing<n>through my whole
being!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, how I wish you could have seen<n>it, Trainer!
Haaah ha ha ha—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's definitely caught a cold. I send<n>her home to
get some rest.
